description: Outlaw motorcycle club formed by Lou Dobkin in 1959 in Prince George's County, Maryland. Known for territorial conflicts with the Hells Angels and other clubs. Active across the United States and Puerto Rico with over 100 chapters. Involved in traditional organized crime, including ties to La Cosa Nostra.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 2011, dozens of the Pagans traveled to the Canadian province of New Brunswick to meet with the Rock Machine.
country_links.context: The Pagans traveled to Canada to meet with the Rock Machine and probe for expansion.
